note: Full unified JSON export planned as docs/ndr_patterns_unified.json (see docs/NDR_REGISTRY_MERGE_PLAN.md). This file is the interim machine-readable index.

patterns.name: Ecosystem Manifest & Audit Harness
patterns.intent: Maintain a single DGAF-governed registry of all projects (repos + deployments + docs + governance) and continuously audit it against live platform inventories.

roles.Sentinel: Owns CI audit workflow; drift = governance event.
roles.Amethyst: Reads registry for planning, routing, and QA sweep enumeration.
roles.COLLEEN: Uses registry as enumeration space for coherence and consistency checks.

applicability: Pre-certification or DGAF tier promotion runs.
Any workflow needing ecosystem-wide agent reasoning.
trigger: New repo or deployment surface created.
Pre-Gold Star or DGAF tier escalation.

liabilities: CI audit silently stops if workflow is disabled

patterns.name: Dual-Orchestrator QA Loop (Amethyst + COLLEEN)
patterns.intent: Use a planner/orchestrator agent (Amethyst) and a dedicated evaluator/critic agent (COLLEEN) to run structured QA, coherence, and consistency sweeps over agent traces and outputs.

roles.Amethyst: Meta-orchestrator: selects traces, plans sweeps, aggregates metrics, recommends routing/prompt/index changes.
roles.COLLEEN: Evaluator/critic: applies QA, coherence, and consistency rubrics; emits JSON scores + rationales.

qa_goal_satisfaction.description: Did output satisfy explicit goal with no missing critical steps?

coherence.description: Logical consistency, natural flow, no contradictions across trace.

consistency_confidence.description: Stable outputs on similar inputs; disclaimers calibrated to uncertainty.

applicability: Any project tagged with ndr.dual_orchestrator_qa_loop in ecosystem_registry.
trigger: Scheduled QA sweep or DGAF tier review.

liabilities: Extra compute; tune to avoid score overfitting

patterns.name: SCPE — Structural Context Pruning Engine
patterns.intent: Compress multi-turn context by pruning low-relevance turns below configurable threshold. T0 axiom anchor is always preserved regardless of score.
patterns.hard_invariant: T0 anchor is never configurable; always preserved.

patterns.name: Phi-Closure Gate
patterns.intent: Fibonacci-indexed structural checkpoints trigger escalating governance actions to catch slow drift that semantic checks miss.
patterns.cross_ref_pending: PM-01: P-32 KILL_REC should trigger P-29 risk_block at hook point 2 — cross-ref note pending pre-merge

patterns.name: PDMAL Convergence Monitor
patterns.intent: Watches for multi-turn alignment lock. WATCH at 3 consecutive convergence signals; ALERT at persistent lock.
patterns.best_practice: Triage at first WATCH, not ALERT. By ALERT the lock is entrenched.

patterns.name: Empirical-Threshold-Sweep-over-ML-Classifier
patterns.origin: COMPOSE — registered directly from issue resolution (Issue #5, S034 calibration evidence)
patterns.intent: When a confidence calibration gap exists, prefer grid search over threshold space before introducing an ML classifier. Applicable when gap is threshold-expressible, search space is bounded, and feature space is stable.
patterns.evidence: KAPPA v3.5 -> v3.6: governance_clear 82.6% -> 100% via 14x12 grid sweep. STRONG=0.22, BLENDED=0.18. No ML classifier. BLG-01 closed.
patterns.attestation_status: PENDING — PM-07: Apogee P-30 attestation pass required before canonical promotion

patterns.name: GPT-5.4 Thinking Optimized Prompt Templates
patterns.intent: Canonical prompt templates for operating GPT-5.4 Thinking within the DGAF/PDMAL/Amethyst governance stack. Front-loads constraints so the model's visible reasoning plan can be redirected before computation completes. Covers 5 operational modes: governance doc drafting, FLAG resolution, eval suite development, portfolio refresh, and session open/instantiation.
quick_rules: Name authority chain explicitly (Njineer > Amethyst > Apogee > DemiJoule)
Include THINKING PLAN checklist to redirect before execution
End every output with a verification gate
Paste full doc context — never summarize (1M token window)
confidence_bound field required on all scores

dual_model_workflow.Perplexity_Amethyst: Live GitHub data retrieval, search, citation, priority auditing
dual_model_workflow.GPT54_Thinking: Deep synthesis, code generation, long-horizon governance reasoning, document drafting

review_status.demijole_gate: PASSED — no IP, safety, or ethics flags

patterns.name: Ionian Lock (Bounded Execution Seal)
patterns.intent: Guarantee that at most one resolution path holds active write authority over a bound resource at any moment, by requiring every execution context to emit a seal signal before it yields, suspends, or delegates — and requiring every successor context to verify the seal before acquiring authority.
invariants: single-authority: at most one authority-token active per bound resource at any instant
causal-seal: seal-record contains sufficient reference to final state at seal time
no-silent-yield: context may not terminate/suspend/error without emitting seal-record or triggering contested-seal escalation

failure_modes.name: stale-authority
failure_modes.compensation: reject acquire, force re-seal from last known good state

failure_modes.name: duplicate-seal
failure_modes.compensation: retain earlier seal by causal timestamp

failure_modes.name: phantom-seal
failure_modes.compensation: warn; allow only if yield-reason is no-op-confirmed

failure_modes.name: gap-under-recovery
failure_modes.compensation: reject restore, re-derive from delta log
